gigapan.description:
There are stitching artifacts, I believe because the bugs are in liquid and the stage movement causes problems.
But that doesn't explain the artifact in the top of the petri dish.

This was taken with a manual stage, and a single focal plane.

The question is: what needs to be improved to make this a useable image?
a) solve the stitching artifacts. Would it help to have a good pattern on the part of the stage which is outside of the petri dish, so that the stitcher would get more matches?

b) ?
